Name: Total time spent in rework loops triggered by Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time it takes the Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to be done from its enabling event
Metric: The minimum of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to Time of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants where it occurs vs. in all variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING grouped by org:resource (if applicable)
Metric: The average of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average waiting time after Declaration REJECTED by MISSING before the employee resubmits
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time difference: Declaration REJECTED by MISSING duration vs Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER duration
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Declaration REJECTED by MISSING resolution time (from its occurrence to case closure or restart)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING from the first Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER (in relevant variants)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the subsequent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to the end of the case (including all rework)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in rework paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING relative to the case total duration
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Total elapsed time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to the final Request Payment in completed variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to Payment Handled in cases that eventually complete
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the closest preceding Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING after the execution of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE (in rework loops)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING since the last Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the next Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the previous Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING (for variants where it follows)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to the next approval activity (any APPROVED type)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Declaration REJECTED by MISSING Cycle Time (from its start to its completion)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of cases containing Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to cases without it
Metric: the average of the duration between the first time instant when <ppinot4py.model.states.RuntimeState object at 0x7fc9ef3c5750> - AppliesTo.PROCESS and the last time instant when <ppinot4py.model.states.RuntimeState object at 0x7fc9ef3c5790> - AppliesTo.PROCESS filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to the next Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in rework loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'
